nasb.text: and saying, “The time is fulfilled, and the kingdom of God is at hand; repent and believe in the gospel.”

esv.text: and saying, “The time is fulfilled, and the kingdom of God is at hand;repent and believe in the gospel.”

cnv.text: 說：“時候到了，　神的國近了，你們應當悔改，相信福音。”

ccb.text: “时候到了，上帝的国临近了，你们要悔改，相信福音。”

csbs.text: 说：“日期满了，神的国近了！你们应当悔改，相信福音！”
